E(phase, mesh)/N(H2O, phase) - E(Ih, same mesh)/N(H2O, Ih)

stable_candidates.relative_energy_construction: E(phase, mesh)/N(H2O, phase) - E(Ih, same mesh)/N(H2O, Ih)

phase_convergence_rule: a phase is k-point converged at N^3 when |Erel(N^3)-Erel((N-1)^3)| <= 0.05 kJ mol^-1 per H2O
